ddls:
CREATE TABLE "ports" (
  "port_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each port */,
  "port_number" INTEGER /* Number of the port */,
  "protocol" TEXT /* Protocol used by the port (e.g., TCP, UDP) */,
  "direction" TEXT /* Direction of the port (e.g., Inbound, Outbound) */,
  "is_open" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the port is currently open */,
  "last_checked" TEXT /* Last time the port was checked for status */,
  "security_policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a security policy applied to the port */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("port_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "protocols" (
  "protocol_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each protocol */,
  "protocol_name" TEXT /* Name of the protocol (e.g., TCP, UDP) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the protocol */,
  "is_encrypted" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the protocol is encrypted */,
  "default_port" INTEGER /* Default port number for the protocol */,
  "security_level" TEXT /* Security level of the protocol (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("protocol_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_types" (
  "access_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access type */,
  "access_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the access type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the access type */,
  "default_port" INTEGER /* Default port number for the access type */,
  "security_policy_id" INTEGER /* Reference to a security policy applied to the access type */,
  "is_admin" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the access type is for administrative purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, user) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last time the user logged in */,
  "status" TEXT /* User status (e.g., active, inactive, banned) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number for additional verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_requests" (
  "access_request_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access request */,
  "port_id" INTEGER /* ID of the port used in the access request */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the access request */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access request was made */,
  "access_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the access type (e.g., SSH, admin console) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access request (e.g., pending, approved, denied) */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the access request */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the request */,
  "approved_date" TEXT /* Date when the request was approved */,
  "nomad_server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Nomad server involved in the request */,
  "database_id" INTEGER /* ID of the database involved in the request */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_requests_port_id FOREIGN KEY ("port_id") REFERENCES ports ("port_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_requests_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_requests_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_requests_access_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("access_type_id") REFERENCES access_types ("access_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "nomad_servers" (
  "nomad_server_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each Nomad server */,
  "nomad_server_name" TEXT /* Name of the Nomad server */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the Nomad server */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the Nomad server */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the server (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "last_maintenance" TEXT /* Last time the server was maintained */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the server (e.g., data center, cloud) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("nomad_server_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "databases" (
  "database_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each database */,
  "database_name" TEXT /* Name of the database */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the database */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the database */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the database (e.g., active, maintenance, decommissioned) */,
  "last_backup" TEXT /* Last time the database was backed up */,
  "location" TEXT /* Physical location of the database (e.g., data center, cloud) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("database_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "source_ip" TEXT /* Source IP address of the access request */,
  "destination_ip" TEXT /* Destination IP address of the access request */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access request was made */,
  "access_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the access type (e.g., SSH, admin console) */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the access request */,
  "nomad_server_id" INTEGER /* ID of the Nomad server involved in the request */,
  "database_id" INTEGER /* ID of the database involved in the request */,
  "request_id" INTEGER /* ID of the corresponding access request */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access in seconds */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the access (e.g., success, failure, timeout) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_request_id FOREIGN KEY ("request_id") REFERENCES access_requests ("access_request_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_nomad_server_id FOREIGN KEY ("nomad_server_id") REFERENCES nomad_servers ("nomad_server_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_database_id FOREIGN KEY ("database_id") REFERENCES databases ("database_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_access_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("access_type_id") REFERENCES access_types ("access_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
